reason: Keep new runtime and API contract failures aligned with backend error conventions.
The refactor changes backend/frontend event and profile contracts across layers.
Existing typed execution request/profile contract to evolve toward capability-based profiles.
Frontend consumer of process/tool event contracts that informs the new canonical event shape.
Existing initial graph state construction and tool/profile projection pattern.
Use stable, structured logging in new runtime and policy modules.
Current event envelope and emitter contract that will be standardized.
Unify scattered tool metadata, runtime context, and event envelope logic instead of duplicating glue code.
Preserve typed boundaries and add regression coverage for contract changes.
